name: Lemon-Pepper Chicken Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 4 chicken breasts, halves, boned, and skinned
1 medium red pepper, seeded, cut into 1/4-inch strips
1 medium green pepper, seeded, cut into 1/4-inch strips
1 medium onion, cut into 1/2 inch wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the olive oil into a large non-stick frying pan over medium-high heat.
2. Add the red pepper and onion strips and cook, stirring, for about 3 to 4 minutes or until the vegetables are crisp tender.
3. Remove the vegetables; set aside.
4. In the drippings remaining in the pan, add the chicken breasts.
5. Sprinkle half a teaspoon of lemon pepper over the chicken and stir-fry for 5 minutes or until the chicken is lightly browned and fork tender.
6. In a small bowl, mix together the chicken broth, lemon juice, remaining lemon pepper, and cornstarch.
7. Add this mixture to the chicken and cook, stirring, until slightly thickened.
8. Stir in the capers and reserved vegetables; heat through.
9. Serve over Capellini pasta or other thin pasta.
10. Garnish with chopped parsley.
